summary.attempts_note: exact attempt/transport-retry counters are NOT determinable from the envelopes (a retried-then-succeeded call leaves one envelope); lower bound = one attempt per completed call
summary.census_provenance: RECONSTRUCTED post-hoc from raw envelopes by TALLY-II after external process kill; not the runner's own finalization
summary.cost_basis: R15 amended_price_basis_usd_per_mtok via PRICE_TABLE (claude-haiku-4.5 1.00/5.00, gpt-5.6-luna 1.00/6.00, kimi-k3 3.00/15.00); no per-call cost field exists in the envelopes, so this is a token-based computation from provider_reported input/output tokens
summary.cost_disposition: <= reconstructed_token_based_cost_bound_usd, pending owner dashboard confirmation; excludes any provider-side billing for the uncertain-write call-296 (body never received)
summary.floor_note: PREREG-v0.2.md line 77 defines the banking floor as >=90% analyzability overall and >=80% in every core arm-by-subject-by-family stratum. Analyzability is a POST-SCORING determination; this census reports EMISSION-COMPLETION rates (envelopes present / scheduled) as the necessary upstream precondition, computed here at overall and per-subject-slot granularity. The arm-by-subject-by-family analyzability floor is evaluated downstream, not by this census.
summary.stop_reason: session-plumbing reaped the runner process tree mid-call-296 after ~98 min of no progress on that call; runner never wrote its own finalization (no exit line in run.log)
